steps.title: Model the line of best fit
steps.content: The question asks for the predicted density at $x=1.2$, so use the line of best fit. Two readable points on the line are about $(0,5.8)$ and $(2,3.9)$. A quick Desmos table regression gives a line near $y=-0.95x+5.8$.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 1.2
steps.content: Substitute $x=1.2$ into the model: $y=-0.95(1.2)+5.8=4.66$. So the predicted density is about $4.6$ grams per cubic centimeter.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The closest listed value is $4.6$, so choice C is correct.
